titleStmt.title: SII 24.87: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 87. (A.R. No. 119 of 1947-48.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Records sale of tax-free (tirumaḍaippuṟam) land in Viḷānāḍu in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to Śīrāḷaṉ Tiruchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ alias Adhikārigaḷ Vīra-Vichchādira Mūvēndavēḷār, for supply of paddy to the Śrībhaṇḍāram and also for offerings to the god on the occasion of reciting the Tiruvāymoḻi. The record is dated in the 40th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir tuṇaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷami riya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭātti vaṭaticai vākaic cūṭit tenticait temaru kama
lap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannila tavira Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭum taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa kol ticaitoṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila vaḷākam Eṅkaṇu n=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟi
vān=tarattu pūpar tiṟai viṭu tantu talañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai ṅkiya tenna parun=talaittiṭat tan ponnakaṟ puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vi nnāḷ piṟkula piṟai pol niṟpiḻai koṭi ṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenan tuṅka pattiraiyaḷavu Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu
m viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷu n=talaivirittala marak kuṭaticait tannāṭukantu tānum tāṉai ḷiṭṭappala pala mutukum payantetir māṟina jeyapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻum cel viyum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭantaiyariṭṭamum Iḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari ni
raiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇavennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaik koṇ ṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷat taṭaittu veḷḷa varu parittalaṅka poru parittalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñceṉaiyai yevip pañcavarai(va)var poruta
porkkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattu nāṭaṭippaṭut car tiriyum poṟṟa veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampan ticai toṟum niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiḻp potiyilum mattave ṅkaripaṭu maiyyaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭ ṭe llai kāṭṭik kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cā(v)eai
ṟellān tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiya naṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟal koḷ siṅhāsanan tiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramum tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka viṟṟirun taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarānac ca(k)kravartikaḷ śrī ku
lottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nārppatāvatu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku śrī petimaṅkalattu vaṭamaturai piṟantā nampiyum cempiyan mātevi Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanampiyum perumpuliyūr nanta yaṇa nampiyum nā r tirunāṭuṭaiyānampiyum śrīpaṇṭāravāriyam Āritan tiruvākkulamuṭaiyān cirākavanum Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum Āritan kecavan taniyiḷa
ñciṅkamum pāratāyan tiruvaraṅkanārāya num pāratāyan ko Aṟivariyānum pāratāyan Ārāvamutu cirāmanum �yan kūttan tiruveṅkaṭamum kāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanum sabhaikkaṇakku tiruvāṉaikkāval periyānāna karuṇākarapiriyanum śrī vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvākkulamuṭaiyānum Āka Āḻvār kanmikaḷom pālaiyūr ki cirāḷan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai yānāna Atikārikaḷ vi
raviccātira muventaveḷārkku nāṅkaḷ ttu kuṭutta paricāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna keraḷāntakavaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭuk kāraik kuṭi nilattum taṇṭuṟai nilattum Āṟuṭaintu nūṟu sammatsarattin Uṟ deśappaṭi maṇaliṭṭu pāḻ kiṭanta nilattil nāṅkaḷḷivarkku tanmañceyya Ivar tiruttik koḷ tuk kuṭutta In nilattukku Icain
ta kiḻpārkellai tirunantavānam kuṇavalli tirunantavānappuṟattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai taḷā cai maṇali Innilattukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai vikkiramacoḻa pāṇṭiyatevar tirunanta vānappuṟamāna nilattukku kiḻakkum(m) vaṭapāṟkellai viracoḻat tiru nantavānattukku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṅkellaiyuḷḷakappaṭṭa nilam Arai tiruttit tan
mañc(o)yya Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattukku Oṭukkina kāconṟu Ikkāconṟuṅ koṇṭu Innila maraiyun tirutti Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattukku puncai varicaippaṭi veli Onṟukku rājakecariyāl nellu Eṇkalamāka puncaivaricaippaṭi yāluḷḷa nel Āḻvār śrī paṇṭāratte Aḷakkak kaṭavatākavum Itil mikutiyāluḷḷa pokaṅkoṇṭu Iraṇṭu Iraṇ tiru ve tiru
vāymoḻi keṭṭaruḷum potu tirunāḷ toṟum Amutu ceytaruḷum Appamutu nūṟukku veṇṭum Aricikkum paruppu ney kku viraku ḷiṭṭa vastukkaḷukku vaḷḷiṭam ṟum veṇṭuvanavaṟṟukkum Innilattil Iṟai mikuti [pokaṅkoṇṭu ceyyakkaṭavatākavum Ippa tauṟa
maṟṟum Innilattukku ve tiruviḷakkā Uḷḷiṭṭa tiruviru kuṭi Ippaṭi kalveṭṭuvikkavum Ipparicu Icain=ta kāconṟuṅ koṇṭu In nilam Araiyum putikaḷ van cirāḷan tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyā ttu
Āḻvār Ippaṭikku śrī vayiṣṇavakkaṇakku tiruveṅkaṭavan tiruvāykkula muṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkane neneḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiven nāṉ tiru nāṭuṭaiyānen ḻuttu śrīvaiṣṇavarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
